supportChat.welcome: 👋 Hello! I am the SUNTREX assistant. How can I help you?
supportChat.revertedToAI: You are connected back to the AI assistant.
supportChat.handoffMessage: Connecting you with an agent... Please wait.
supportChat.homeSubtitle: Choose a topic or ask your question

faqDesc.tracking: Track your orders in real time

responses.tracking:
To track your order, go to **My account** > **My orders**. Each order includes real-time tracking with SUNTREX DELIVERY.

Would you like me to check a specific order?
responses.returns:
The return process is simple:
• Deadline: **14 days** after receipt
• Go to **My purchases** → select the order → **Report an issue**
• Return costs depend on the seller

Is there a specific order you need help with?
responses.billing:
For any billing question:
• Your invoices are available in **My account** > **Billing**
• Payment is secured via **Stripe** (3D Secure)
• SUNTREX fee: **5% lower** than competitors

What is your exact question?
responses.other:
I am the SUNTREX AI assistant. I can help you with:
• Order tracking
• Product information (panels, inverters, batteries)
• Returns and support procedures
• Billing and payments

Ask me your question!
responses.default: Thank you for your message. Let me check that for you...
responses.unavailable: AI service temporarily unavailable. Contact us by email at contact@suntrex.eu or via WhatsApp at +33 7 00 00 00 00.
responses.agent: I am connecting you with an agent. Please wait...
